description: Navigate to Gemini, send a prompt in a new conversation, and extract the response text.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Gemini uses a rich text editor (contenteditable div or textarea) for prompt input. The page is a Google Angular/Lit-based SPA. Responses render in message-content containers. The send button is typically identified by aria-label or mat-icon.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Use aria labels and mat-* component selectors for Angular Material components. The input area uses contenteditable or a dedicated textarea. Response containers use structured class names. Wait for response completion by detecting the stop of streaming.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Gemini requires Google account authentication. Use saved session cookies. Typing simulation with human-like delays. Google has sophisticated bot detection — keep interactions natural.
reasoning.performance: Expected run time: 30-120 seconds depending on response length (navigation 3s + typing 5s + response generation 20-100s + extraction 2s).

prompt.description: The prompt text to send to Gemini.
prompt.example: Explain the difference between TCP and UDP in 3 sentences.

wait_timeout_s.description: Maximum seconds to wait for Gemini to finish responding. Default 120.

new_conversation.description: Whether to start a new conversation. Default true.

steps.description: Load saved Gemini session cookies (Google account)
Navigate to Gemini app page for a new conversation
Verify Google authentication is active — if redirected to login, abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
Wait for the prompt input area to be ready
Type the prompt into the input area with human-like delays

steps.selector: button[aria-label='Send message'], button.send-button, button[mat-icon-button] mat-icon[data-mat-icon-name='send'], .send-button-container button
steps.description: Click the send button to submit the prompt
Wait for the Gemini response container to appear
Wait for Gemini to finish generating the response (no new content for 3 seconds)
Extract the full response text and HTML from the last Gemini response
Return the extracted response as structured data

response_text.description: Plain text content of Gemini's response

response_html.description: HTML content of Gemini's response (preserves formatting)

has_code_blocks.description: Whether the response contains code blocks

prompt_sent.description: The original prompt that was sent

error_handling.session_expired: Detect accounts.google.com redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED error
error_handling.rate_limited: Detect rate limit or quota exceeded message — abort with RATE_LIMITED error and cooldown
error_handling.response_timeout: If response does not stabilize within wait_timeout_s, extract partial response and flag as PARTIAL
error_handling.empty_response: If no response container found after 30s, abort with NO_RESPONSE error
error_handling.selector_timeout: Retry once with 20s timeout, then abort
